title: The Silence of Early Mornings
content: Every morning before sunrise, Daniel sat alone in his kitchen with a cup of black coffee resting between his hands. At that hour, the city outside still felt unfinished, as if the noise and movement of daily life had not fully awakened yet. He had grown attached to those quiet moments over the years. The silence gave him space to think without interruptions, deadlines, or endless notifications demanding attention. Sometimes he simply watched the pale morning light slowly enter the apartment while listening to the distant sound of buses beginning their routes. Those early mornings reminded him that peace still existed somewhere beneath the constant pressure and speed of modern life, even if only for a short while each day.
